overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Grand Theft Auto V showing the character Michael exploring a coastal park area at sunset. The character traverses cracked pavement, ascends two long wooden staircases, and walks around a brick park building at the upper level, with palm trees and power transmission towers visible against a pink evening sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: lower park level with cracked pavement approaching stairs

events.description: character begins ascending the first long wooden staircase

agents.ego_description: walking across cracked pavement toward the base of a long wooden staircase

entered.detail: weathered cracked asphalt surface with white painted lines
long wooden staircase with metal railings ascending the hillside
tall palm trees scattered across the rocky hillside
large metal electrical transmission towers visible in the distance
dry rocky terrain with sparse vegetation
diamond-shaped traffic sign on a pole

segments.scene_description: The character walks across a cracked asphalt area in a park at dusk, approaching a long wooden staircase. Palm trees and power transmission towers are visible against the pink sky, with rocky hillsides framing the left side of the view.

scene_state.functional_zone: long wooden staircase with metal railings

events.description: character reaches the top of the first staircase and steps onto flat pavement

agents.ego_description: climbing the wooden stairs with metal railings, moving steadily upward

entered.detail: flat stone tile pavement at the top of the stairs
ornate black metal street lamps with white globes

segments.scene_description: The character ascends the long wooden staircase flanked by metal railings and lamp posts. The view opens up to show more palm trees and the upper park level as the character reaches the top of the stairs.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper parking lot and paved overlook area

events.description: character briefly steps onto grass strip while crossing between paved areas
approaching the second wooden staircase at the far end of the parking lot

agents.ego_description: walking across the upper paved area and parking lot toward a second staircase

entered.detail: open asphalt parking area with white painted lines
second long wooden staircase leading to the highest level
small brick building with wooden roof structure at the top of the hill

segments.scene_description: The character walks across the upper parking lot area, passing palm trees and approaching a second wooden staircase. A brick park building becomes visible at the top of the hill as the character moves forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: second staircase and upper park building area

events.description: character reaches top of second staircase and begins walking around the brick building

agents.ego_description: climbing the second wooden staircase and then walking around the brick park building at the top

entered.detail: black metal park benches near the building
metal trash receptacles next to the building

segments.scene_description: The character ascends the second wooden staircase to reach the highest level of the park, where a brick building with wooden architectural details sits. The character walks around the building, passing benches and trash cans, with the dusk sky visible in the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a coastal park at dusk, ascending from a cracked lower lot to a high plateau featuring a brick building. It begins with the character traversing cracked asphalt framed by rocky hillsides and power transmission towers under a pink evening sky. As the character approaches and ascends a long wooden staircase flanked by lamp posts, the perspective opens up to reveal the upper park level and scattered palm trees. The scene then shifts across the upper parking area toward a second set of stairs, bringing a brick park building into view at the top of the hill. Finally, the camera follows the character up the last flight of stairs to the highest level, moving past benches and trash cans to circle the architectural details of the brick building against the fading light.
